sourceNotes: Source follow-up pass 55 2026-05-28: Skopelosweb directly names the Ftelia and Neraki beaches on Skopelos, supporting identity/local-area traceability only. Confidence remains low; coordinates, access, services, amenities, wind profile, and scoring were not changed.

Skopelos tourist evidence pass 2026-06-01: Skopelosweb provides concrete Ftelia/Neraki evidence: same local beach naming, access by passable dirt road, sand/pebble terrain, deep water, organized beach-bar context and WC. Kept medium because this app has separate Ftelia and Neraki records and the duplicate/naming boundary needs later cleanup. Coordinates, windProfile, scoring, photos and live calm/protected/safe claims were not changed.

High-confidence Skopelos follow-up 2026-06-02: official Visit Skopelos confirms the Ftelia or Neraki naming, supporting the same local beach identity together with the existing Skopelosweb metadata for access, terrain, depth and beach-bar context. High confidence applies to the static Ftelia/Neraki alias metadata only; duplicate cleanup with any separate Ftelia record remains future work. No windProfile, scoring, photos, live calm/protected/safe, or ideal-beach claim was changed.

accessNotes.en: Den yparchei akomi source-backed endeixi gia chomatodromo, monopati i eykoli odiki prosvasi. Krata tin prosvasi os mi epivevaiomeni mechri na prostethei amesi pigi.

metadata.sourceNotes: Source follow-up pass 55 2026-05-28: GrecoSailor directly lists Paralia Trachili on Skopelos with anchorage coordinates, supporting identity/location traceability only. Confidence remains low; coordinates, access, services, amenities, wind profile, and scoring were not changed.

sourceNotes: Source-backed Skopelos pass 2026-05-28: Ftelia Beach Bar official page directly supports Ftelia as an equipped beach with umbrellas, loungers, cabanas, Wi-Fi, sockets, toilets, showers, changing rooms, snacks/drinks, and access by private dirt road or nearby bus stop. Confidence lifted to medium; coordinates, wind profile, and scoring were not changed.

Skopelos tourist evidence pass 2026-06-01: Ftelia Beach official page and Skopelosweb support Ftelia/Ftelia-Neraki as an organized beach with umbrellas, loungers, cabanas, Wi-Fi, sockets, toilets, showers, changing rooms, snacks/drinks, beach bar/WC and dirt-road or bus-stop access. Coordinates, windProfile, scoring, photos and live calm/protected/safe claims were not changed.

accessNotes.en: I topiki pigi anaferei stasi Neo Klima gia Chovolo kai perpatima peripou 600 m./7-10 lepta, me prosochi stin archi tis aktis kai pithano syntomo perasma mesa apo to nero.
accessNotes.gr: Η τοπική πηγή αναφέρει στάση Νέο Κλήμα για Χόβολο και περπάτημα περίπου 600 μ./7-10 λεπτά, με προσοχή στην αρχή της ακτής και πιθανό σύντομο πέρασμα μέσα από το νερό.

sourceNotes: Source cleanup 2026-05-29: Skopelosweb directly supports Hovolo identity, near-matching coordinates, 600 m / 7-10 minute walking access from Neo Klima, sand/pebble/rock beach material, deep water, and nearby pre-beach food/WC context. No wind, wave, calm-water, or protection claim was added.

Skopelos tourist evidence pass 2026-06-01: Skopelosweb and OSM support Hovolo identity near Neo Klima, 600 m / 7-10 minute walking access from the bus stop, sand/pebble/rock terrain, white-rock setting, deep water and nearby pre-beach food/WC context. Coordinates, windProfile, scoring, photos and live calm/protected/safe claims were not changed.
